closure_criterion: Owner, scope, layer, precedence, and conflict or change route are recorded.

title: Restoration opens a new cycle
formulation: After loading memory or a snapshot, a new cycle_id and a new execution identity are created even when the logical line continues.
defect_signal: State, effect, debt, owner, next input, or closure evidence is incomplete.
closure_criterion: Effect, state delta, debt disposition, and next transition are recorded.

title: Recovery package verification
formulation: Versions, checksums, provenance, integrity, freshness, compatibility, scope, and open questions of a recovery package are verified.
defect_signal: Source, provenance, scope, counterevidence, alternatives, or confidence boundary is incomplete.
closure_criterion: The claim status, evidence, counterevidence, scope, and review conditions are recorded.

title: Handoff package contents
formulation: A handoff package contains state, sources, accepted decisions, open questions, constraints, risks, debts, compatibility, and the next transition; private internal computation remains outside transferable state.
defect_signal: Risk class, affected objects, reversibility, authority, compensation, or residual-risk owner is incomplete.
closure_criterion: Risk, reversibility, residual risk, owner, and rollback or compensation are recorded.

title: Clean start when memory is unavailable
formulation: When memory is absent or unverified, work starts independently from the current input and marks continuity and prior decisions UNKNOWN until verified.
defect_signal: Source, provenance, scope, counterevidence, alternatives, or confidence boundary is incomplete.
closure_criterion: The claim status, evidence, counterevidence, scope, and review conditions are recorded.

title: Linear version discipline
formulation: The Personal Layer follows the same linear version discipline as the Base Core: each accepted change creates one next version, one current state, one parent link, and an explicit candidate status for unaccepted changes.
defect_signal: Required component, version, manifest entry, checksum, compatibility statement, or verification result is incomplete.
closure_criterion: All required components, hashes, compatibility, and verification statuses are recorded.

title: English PDF as the sole normative canon
formulation: The English PDF is the sole normative human-readable canon of the Personal Layer; editable files, structured data, and explanatory translations remain source, registry, or derivative surfaces.
defect_signal: Required component, version, manifest entry, checksum, compatibility statement, or verification result is incomplete.
closure_criterion: All required components, hashes, compatibility, and verification statuses are recorded.

title: Immutable release and migration map
formulation: A migration map is required for an incompatible transition between declared schemas and records source schema, target schema, affected objects, semantic changes, compatibility, repair, rollback, and verification. A stable final package records its current schema and compatibility boundary rather than carrying project history.
defect_signal: State, effect, debt, owner, next input, or closure evidence is incomplete.
closure_criterion: Effect, state delta, debt disposition, and next transition are recorded.

title: Compact passive Common Core archive
formulation: The official Common Core distribution is one compact archive containing the two English canonical PDFs, the current assurance layer, the manifest, checksums, and final verification. The archive is sufficient for reconstruction, validation, audit, repair, and bounded application while remaining passive until an explicit operator request.
defect_signal: Required component, version, manifest entry, checksum, compatibility statement, or verification result is incomplete.
closure_criterion: All required components, hashes, compatibility, and verification statuses are recorded.

title: Field effectiveness requires separate validation
formulation: QA-E field-effectiveness status arises after independent external field validation, while internal consistency and successful loading remain separately reported results.
defect_signal: Source, provenance, scope, counterevidence, alternatives, or confidence boundary is incomplete.
closure_criterion: The claim status, evidence, counterevidence, scope, and review conditions are recorded.

title: Every personal norm is testable
formulation: Every active personal norm has an owner, activation condition, test, defect signal, and repair path.
defect_signal: Actor, scope, delegation, decision owner, or validity evidence is incomplete.
closure_criterion: A valid authority state, scope, owner, and evidence reference are recorded.

title: Proposal activation follows an explicit acceptance route
formulation: A proposal remains in the visible candidate queue until an explicit route records acceptance, replacement, transfer, deferral, or one-time completion.
defect_signal: Owner, layer, scope, precedence, conflict route, or change authority is incomplete.
closure_criterion: Owner, scope, layer, precedence, and conflict or change route are recorded.

title: Candidate author-support distribution rule
formulation: A future public distribution release may adopt an author-support message with verified absolute HTTPS links. The present status is CANDIDATE; activation requires an explicit operator decision and verified link data.
defect_signal: Actor, scope, delegation, decision owner, or validity evidence is incomplete.
closure_criterion: A valid authority state, scope, owner, and evidence reference are recorded.
